case_title: MIDTOWN PARK CORPORATION VS. APOLINARIO DIAZ et al

docket_entries.description: DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE FILED BY DEFENDANT DIAZ, MARIA HEARING SET FOR JUL-28-2010 AT 09:30 AM IN DEPT 301
ORDER SUSTAINING DEMURRER

LAW AND MOTION 301, THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: DEFENDANT MARIA DIAZ' DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT IS SUSTAINED WITH 5 DAYS LEAVE TO AMEND TO PLEAD FACTS SHOWING AN EXEMPTION FROM THE RENT ORDINANCE. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: CAROL KAREN, CSR # 8189 301/PJB
